title: Malaysian Fried Rice
description: A classic Malaysian dish made with fried rice, vegetables, and spices. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced onion and minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add cooked rice to the wok or skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add soy sauce, oyster sauce (if using), and palm sugar to the rice mixture and stir-fry until combined.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt as needed.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and garnish with chopped green onions (optional).
